zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Missenden於1319年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登時，他的父親Thomas De Missenden20歲，母親Mrs. Thomas De Missenden20歲。他於1339年與Isabella de Brocas在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年在他的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Missenden于1319年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登时，他的父亲Thomas De Missenden20岁，母亲Mrs. Thomas De Missenden20岁。他于1339年与Isabella de Brocas在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年在他的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登。

nameMeanings.name: Missenden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Fishenden
meanings: English: locative name from the lost place-name Festinden in Hawkhurst (Kent), recorded as Festendenn about 1270.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Missenden was born in 1319, in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas De Missenden, was 20 and his mother, Mrs. Thomas De Missenden, was 20. He married Isabella de Brocas in 1339, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1369, in his hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Missenden est né en 1319, à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas De Missenden, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Thomas De Missenden, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Brocas en 1339, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1369, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1339 in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England Isabella de Brocas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1369 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Isabella de Brocas nel 1339, nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1369, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Missendenが1319年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ミセンデンで生まれた時，父Thomas De Missendenは20歳，母Mrs. Thomas De Missendenは20歳であった。1339年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードでIsabella de Brocasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ミセンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Missenden(이)가 1319년 영국 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas De Missenden(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Thomas De Missenden(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1339년 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 Isabella de Brocas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Isabella de Brocas em 1339, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Missenden родился в 1319 г. в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas De Missenden было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Thomas De Missenden, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Brocas в 1339 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1369 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Isabella de Brocas en 1339, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas.
